subcodes.title: Words to Charles and Mariam Haney spoken in Feb. 1909
subcodes.first_line: In Yazd an ordeal transpired unparalleled in history. After the enemies had besieged he quarter inhabited by the believers, they assaulted them
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
